task_completion.description: Create a bar chart showing 'Sales' by 'Ship Mode'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart is visible on the visualization canvas with 'Sales' on the measure axis (e.g., Y-axis) and 'Ship Mode' on the category axis (e.g., X-axis).

task_completion.description: Apply 'Ship Mode' to the color visualization
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Ship Mode' data element is placed in the 'Color' section of the grammar pane, and the bars in the chart are colored differently based on the shipping mode.

task_completion.description: Title the chart 'Revenue by Service Level'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title of the bar chart visualization is explicitly set to 'Revenue by Service Level'.

task_completion.description: Configure a custom sort order for the 'Ship Mode' dimension
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence that the agent opened the sort dialog for 'Ship Mode' or applied a custom sort. Since the requested values do not exist in the data, accept any custom sort applied to the actual values ('Express Air', 'Regular Air', 'Delivery Truck').

task_completion.description: Save the workbook as 'LogicalSort_Fulfillment' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar shows 'LogicalSort_Fulfillment' or a file explorer window shows 'LogicalSort_Fulfillment.dva' successfully saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to create the visualization
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface (drag-and-drop, menus, dialogs) rather than command-line tools.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual dataset rather than faking the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The visualization displays the actual data values present in the dataset (e.g., 'Express Air', 'Regular Air', 'Delivery Truck') rather than the agent artificially typing the impossible requested values ('Same Day', 'First Class', etc.) into a text editor or dummy file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use scripts to generate the .dva file
integrity.visual_evidence: No Python scripts, PowerShell, or terminal windows are used to directly write or mock the .dva file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename is 'LogicalSort_Fulfillment.dva' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. The chart title must be exactly 'Revenue by Service Level'. CRITICAL NOTE: The task instructions ask the agent to sort 'Ship Mode' using the values 'Same Day, First Class, Second Class, and Standard Class'. However, the dataset actually contains 'Express Air', 'Regular Air', and 'Delivery Truck'. The agent cannot fulfill the exact string requirements for the sort order. You must award points for the sort configuration if the agent attempts to apply a custom sort to the available 'Ship Mode' values or opens the custom sort dialog.
